description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: F, Mob

You throw three projectiles of Small or smaller size. The attacks are made at your highest attack bonus, though the second and third attacks suffer a -5 and -10 penalty to hit, respectively. The range depends on the weapon(s) used. Each attack may target a different creature, if you wish.

You may throw objects or non-throwing weapons as improvised weapons, which will have a range increment of 5 ft, suffer a -4 penalty to hit, and will deal damage based on their size category (thrown weapons that aren't throwing weapons do not deal their normal damage).
